MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-16-2021 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. MARINA FRANCO, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CUONG LA APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. QUY DAO, COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER, WITH OATH ON FILE, PRESENT AND ASSISTED DEFENDANT. THE COURT ASSIGNS A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH JUDGE JEFFREY ROSS IN DEPT. 502. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON SEP-08-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. PARTIES NEED TO COMPLY WITH THE NOTICE AND TIME OF PLACE OF TRIAL BY E-MAILING OR CALLING THE COURT 7-14 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
